info.name: Factset Returns the Coverage for the Requested Ticker/isin Along With Other Response Fields for Level1 Data.

params.name: tickers
params.description:
The requested list of one or more tickers.

The `tickers` and `isins` parameters provide two different ways to specify the identifiers for data retrieved. Please enter either the tickers or isins parameter.

Maximum 10 tickers per request

params.name: factsetExchangeCode
params.description:
This parameter is used to filter the results based on the FactSet specific regional or composite exchange code.

**NOTE**:Does not support multiple factsetExchangeCodes

params.name: isins
params.description:
Specifies the ISIN of the record.

Please enter either the `tickers` or `isins` parameter.

Maximum 10 ISINs per request.

items.docs: Returns coverage for specified tickers for Level1 Data

info.name: Factset Requests the Creation of Tick-by-tick File

items.docs: Data available from 20120101 to previous day.

info.name: Factset Returns the Status of the Id

params.name: id
params.description: id returned by files create endpoint to poll and collect status of the query

items.docs: Need to plug-in the id get from /create endpoint into /status endpoint

info.name: Factset Returns the Tick-by-tick Data in Files Requested in the /create Endpoint

params.name: id
params.description: id returned by files create endpoint to poll and collect results of the query

params.name: _paginationLimit
params.description: Specifies the maximum number of results to return per response page

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Specifies the starting point for pagination. This parameter is used to identify the beginning of next set of results

items.docs: Returns the files from tickhistory endpoint
